description: Product Description Introducing the Trespass Windproof Golf Umbrella: 30 inches of unyielding protection with a sturdy fibreglass shaft, featuring a stylish EVA handle! Auto Open: Convenient one-handed operation for quick deployment in changing weather Soft Grip Handle: Ergonomic design ensures a comfortable and secure hold during use Fabric Sleeve with Carry Strap: Easy transport and storage with an included stylish sleeve Plastic Tip: Durable tip enhances overall strength, resisting bends and breakage in wind Windproof Design: Special construction withstands strong gusts, preventing inversion and damage Trespass Windproof Golf Umbrella - 30 Inch Birdie Introducing the Trespass Windproof Golf Umbrella – Your Ultimate Outdoor Companion! Embrace the unpredictable British weather while enjoying your favourite outdoor activities with the Trespass Windproof Golf Umbrella. Perfectly designed for golf enthusiasts, nature lovers, and anyone who relishes being outside, this stylish, functional umbrella is a must-have in your outdoor gear. Soft Grip Handle Equipped with an automatic opening mechanism, it ensures swift deployment when needed. The windproof structure is designed to endure harsh gusts, preventing inversion. Its robust frame promises long-lasting use, while the lightweight design enhances portability. Auto Open It features an auto open function for quick access during sudden rain.The sturdy frame ensures durability, while the lightweight construction makes it easy to carry and ideal for golfers seeking reliable protection.
